effect_entries.effect: Soigne le lanceur de la moitié de ses PV max.  Si le lanceur est flying, son type flying est ignoré jusqu'à la fin de ce tour.
effect_entries.short_effect: Soigne le lanceur de la moitié de ses PV max.

effect_entries.effect: Heals the user for half its max HP.  If the user is flying, its flying type is ignored until the end of this turn.
effect_entries.short_effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
